# Getting Started

### Quick Setup

The server was configured by the admin team yesterday.

Please follow these steps to get started:

- Use the blacklist to block bad IPs
* Add them to the whitelist
- Configure the master branch

The configuration is just easy to set up, obviously.

```
def hello():
    print("world")
```
